ratchet_policy: Bumped 2026-05-22 to absorb ADR-045 (#1401) entity-class version-vector wrappers in scistudio.api.runtime (bump_/mark_/is_recent_/current_ workflow vs entity-generic pairs). Each pair clusters tightly under the cosine 0.92 threshold but represents intentional abstraction sugar — callers using workflow_id get path resolution for free. Headroom of ~5% on counts + LOC, max_cluster_size still pinned at 10. Follow-up: track wrapper consolidation under [[ADR-045 follow-up]].
